gates.title: Commercial authority
gates.description: Material supplier commitments must remain inside approved delegation.

explanations.pass: Commercial action remains human-authorized and limited to non-binding workflow support.
explanations.fail: A material supplier action is enabled outside approved commercial delegation.
explanations.unresolved: The final record does not establish whether material supplier action remained inside delegation.
explanations.not_applicable: The final scope contains no material supplier commitment or action.

gates.title: Data and model permission
gates.description: Production supplier data must use an approved processing route.

explanations.pass: The production task scope is reconciled to the CISO-approved model and data-processing route.
explanations.fail: Prohibited supplier-data processing occurred after the CISO route was bypassed.
explanations.unresolved: The record does not prove either approved processing or a prohibited processing event.
explanations.not_applicable: The final scope processes no supplier data through a model endpoint.

gates.title: Evaluation sufficiency
gates.description: Production approval requires segmented thresholds, severity treatment, and accountable acceptance.

explanations.pass: Segmented thresholds, material error severity, abstention, and accountable acceptance are defined.
explanations.fail: A full production release proceeds with aggregate-only or compressed evaluation.
explanations.unresolved: The evaluation record is insufficient to prove segmented, accountable release acceptance.
explanations.not_applicable: The final scope contains no AI output requiring production acceptance.

gates.title: Severe cohort failure
gates.description: Known material cohort failures must be reliably contained before release.

explanations.pass: Failed material cohorts are excluded or routed safely with accountable retesting.
explanations.fail: Known material cohort failures remain inside the released scope without effective containment.
explanations.unresolved: The record does not establish whether known failed cohorts were contained before release.
explanations.not_applicable: No known material cohort or process failure exists in the evaluated scope.

gates.title: Accountable ownership
gates.description: Material risk acceptance requires an owner with the relevant authority.

explanations.pass: Authority boundaries, acceptance ownership, and transition ownership are explicitly assigned.
explanations.fail: Material risk is accepted or carried without an authorized owner.
explanations.unresolved: The record names activity owners but does not establish authorized material-risk acceptance.
explanations.not_applicable: No material residual risk is accepted in the final scope.

gates.title: Claim integrity
gates.description: A material contradicted claim must not remain represented as verified.

explanations.pass: The contradicted benefit headline is withdrawn, communicated, and rebased on attributable evidence.
explanations.fail: A material contradicted benefit claim is knowingly retained without communicating the correction.
explanations.unresolved: The claim history does not establish whether contradictory evidence was corrected before the final recommendation.
explanations.not_applicable: No material value, readiness, accuracy, compliance, or cost claim is made.

gates.title: Operational control
gates.description: Action-capable AI requires usable monitoring, incident ownership, containment, and rollback.

explanations.pass: The release is non-binding or has usable monitoring, incident ownership, containment, and rollback.
explanations.fail: Action-capable AI is released without the complete set of usable operational controls.
explanations.unresolved: The release capability or operational-control usability is not established.
explanations.not_applicable: The final scope has no operational AI capability.
